title: selago recurva
intro: Selago recurva, also known as Cape Crest or Hooked Cape, is a flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Selago recurva include its ability to aid in the treatment of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and certain cardiovascular conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support kidney function and alleviate symptoms associated with these conditions.
